sourcesContent:
export const products = [
  { id: 1,  name: "iPhone 15 Pro",        category: "Electronics", price: 89999, weight: 171, value: 95, stock: 10, rating: 4.8, reviews: 2341,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1695048133142-1a20484d2569?w=600&q=80",
    description: "The most powerful iPhone ever. Titanium design, A17 Pro chip, 48MP camera system." },
  { id: 2,  name: "Samsung Galaxy S24",   category: "Electronics", price: 79999, weight: 167, value: 90, stock: 8,  rating: 4.7, reviews: 1892,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610945415295-d9bbf067e59c?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Next-gen Galaxy AI features, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, stunning 6.7\" Dynamic AMOLED display." },
  { id: 3,  name: "Sony WH-1000XM5",      category: "Electronics", price: 8999,  weight: 254, value: 80, stock: 25, rating: 4.9, reviews: 5621,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618366712010-f4ae9c647dcb?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery, premium sound quality." },
  { id: 4,  name: "Nike Air Max 270",     category: "Footwear",    price: 9999,  weight: 800, value: 75, stock: 30, rating: 4.6, reviews: 3201,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542291026-7eec264c27ff?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Iconic Air Max heel unit for all-day cushioning. Breathable mesh upper." },
  { id: 5,  name: "Levi's 511 Slim Jeans",category: "Clothing",    price: 3499,  weight: 600, value: 70, stock: 50, rating: 4.5, reviews: 4102,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c3835535d?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Classic slim-fit jeans in premium stretch denim. Versatile everyday style." },
  { id: 6,  name: "Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1",category:"Kitchen",     price: 6999,  weight: 5000,value: 85, stock: 15, rating: 4.8, reviews: 7893,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585515320310-259814833e62?w=600&q=80",
    description: "7-in-1 multi-cooker: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker and more." },
  { id: 7,  name: "MacBook Air M2",       category: "Electronics", price: 114900,weight: 1240,value: 98, stock: 5,  rating: 4.9, reviews: 3412,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611186871525-f8bdd1c4a024?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Supercharged by M2 chip, 18-hour battery, fanless silent design, Liquid Retina display." },
  { id: 8,  name: "Canon EOS R50",        category: "Electronics", price: 49999, weight: 375, value: 92, stock: 7,  rating: 4.7, reviews: 1234,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502920917128-1aa500764cbd?w=600&q=80",
    description: "24.2MP mirrorless camera, 4K video, dual pixel autofocus, perfect for creators." },
  { id: 9,  name: "Adidas Ultraboost 22", category: "Footwear",    price: 12999, weight: 310, value: 78, stock: 20, rating: 4.6, reviews: 2109,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1608231387042-66d1773070a5?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Responsive Boost midsole, Primeknit upper, Continental rubber outsole." },
  { id: 10, name: "Minimal Cotton Tee",   category: "Clothing",    price: 699,   weight: 200, value: 50, stock: 100,rating: 4.3, reviews: 892,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521572163474-6864f9cf17ab?w=600&q=80",
    description: "100% organic cotton, relaxed fit, pre-shrunk. Available in 12 colours." },
  { id: 11, name: "Ergonomic Laptop Stand",category:"Accessories",  price: 2499,  weight: 800, value: 60, stock: 35, rating: 4.4, reviews: 671,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593642632559-0c6d3fc62b89?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Adjustable height & angle, aluminium build, compatible with all laptops." },
  { id: 12, name: "Logitech MX Master 3", category: "Electronics", price: 7999,  weight: 141, value: 82, stock: 40, rating: 4.8, reviews: 4312,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1527864550417-7fd91fc51a46?w=600&q=80",
    description: "Advanced wireless mouse, MagSpeed scroll wheel, 70-day battery life." },
  { id: 13, name: "Nespresso Vertuo",     category: "Kitchen",     price: 14999, weight: 4200,value: 72, stock: 18, rating: 4.6, reviews: 2876,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1495474472287-4d71bcdd2085?w=600&q=80",
    description: "One-touch coffee, 5 cup sizes, centrifusion extraction, includes 12 capsules." },
  { id: 14, name: "Manduka PRO Yoga Mat", category: "Sports",      price: 5499,  weight: 3000,value: 65, stock: 25, rating: 4.7, reviews: 1543,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1601925228008-dcc5f5748ed9?w=600&q=80",
    description: "6mm thick, lifetime guarantee, superior grip, eco-certified materials." },
  { id: 15, name: "iPad Pro 11\" M4",     category: "Electronics", price: 99900, weight: 444, value: 94, stock: 6,  rating: 4.9, reviews: 2100,
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544244015-0df4b3ffc6b0?w=600&q=80",
    description: "M4 chip, Ultra Retina XDR tandem OLED display, Apple Pencil Pro support." },
];

export const categories = ["All", "Electronics", "Footwear", "Clothing", "Kitchen", "Accessories", "Sports"];
